<body class="home blog wp-theme-eonex-recruit-theme">
<div class="wrapper">
<!-- Google Tag Manager (noscript) -->
<noscript><iframe src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-PGMD7ZH8"
height="0" width="0" style="display:none;visibility:hidden"></iframe></noscript>
<!-- End Google Tag Manager (noscript) --><div class="loading">
	<div class="logoWrap">
		<div class="logobase"><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAAAAACH5BAEKAAEALAAAAAABAAEAAAICTAEAOw==" alt="" data-src="https://www.recruit.chika.co.jp/wp-content/themes/eonex-recruit-theme/assets/img/front/parts.svg" decoding="async" class="lazyload"><noscript><img src="https://www.recruit.chika.co.jp/wp-content/themes/eonex-recruit-theme/assets/img/front/parts.svg" alt="" data-eio="l"></noscript></div>
		<div class="logoearth"><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAAAAACH5BAEKAAEALAAAAAABAAEAAAICTAEAOw==" alt="" data-src="https://www.recruit.chika.co.jp/wp-content/themes/eonex-recruit-theme/assets/img/front/earth.svg" decoding="async" class="lazyload"><noscript><img src="https://www.recruit.chika.co.jp/wp-content/themes/eonex-recruit-theme/assets/img/front/earth.svg" alt="" data-eio="l"></noscript></div>
	</div>
</div>
<div class="frontpage">
	<div class="front-catch">安心して暮らせる<br class="under-pc"><span>未来</span>のために</div>
	<div class="front-img">
		<div class="front-videoWrap">
			<div class="canvasWrap">
				<canvas id="towncanvas"></canvas>
			</div>
		</div>
		<div class="front-balloonswrap">
			<div class="front-balloons">
				<div class="smoke balloon">
					<div class="ballooninner">
						<div class="small">けむり</div>
						<div class="large">工場や事業所から<br>排出される煙を<br>測定しています</div>
					</div>
				</div>
				<div class="soil balloon">
					<div class="ballooninner">
						<div class="small soilsmall">土</div>
						<div class="large soillarge">建物や道路を作る前に<br>地面の強度や<br>安全性を調べます</div>
					</div>
				</div>
				<div class="disasterPrevention balloon">
					<div class="ballooninner">
						<div class="small">防災</div>
						<div class="large">地域の安全を守るため、<br>危険の早期発見に<br>取り組んでいます</div>
					</div>
				</div>
				<div class="hotspring balloon">
					<div class="ballooninner">
						<div class="small">温泉</div>
						<div class="large">温泉調査から掘削、<br>設備工事まで一貫して行っています</div>
					</div>
				</div>
				<div class="water balloon">
					<div class="ballooninner">
						<div class="small">水</div>
						<div class="large">川や湖がきれいか、<br>井戸水が飲めるかなどを<br>調べます</div>
					</div>
				</div>
				<div class="pcb balloon">
					<div class="ballooninner">
						<div class="small">塗膜・PCB</div>
						<div class="large">橋に使われている塗料や<br>電気機器の油に有害物質が<br>含まれていないかを調べます</div>
					</div>
				</div>
				<div class="maintenance balloon">
					<div class="ballooninner">
						<div class="small">メンテナンス</div>
						<div class="large">温泉設備の<br>点検・修繕・衛生管理を<br>行っています</div>
					</div>
				</div>
				<div class="well balloon">
					<div class="ballooninner">
						<div class="small">井戸</div>
						<div class="large">生活用・産業用・防災用井戸の<br>掘削と維持管理を<br>行っています</div>
					</div>
				</div>
				<div class="noise balloon">
					<div class="ballooninner">
						<div class="small">騒音</div>
						<div class="large">工場や建設現場、<br>交通による騒音や振動の<br>大きさを測定します</div>
					</div>
				</div>
				<div class="asbest balloon">
					<div class="ballooninner">
						<div class="small">アスベスト</div>
						<div class="large">解体前の建物に<br>アスベストが<br>含まれていないかを<br>調査します</div>
					</div>
				</div>
				<div class="hotspringtruck balloon">
					<div class="ballooninner">
						<div class="small">配湯</div>
						<div class="large">ホテル等へ<br>天然温泉を<br>運んでいます</div>
					</div>
				</div>
			</div>
		</div>
	</div>
	<div class="front-contents">
		<div class="front-background"></div>
		<div class="front-buttonWrap">
			<a href="https://www.recruit.chika.co.jp/recruit-home" class="recruit">新卒採用<span>RECRUIT</span></a>
			<a href="https://www.recruit.chika.co.jp/midcareer-home" class="midcareer">キャリア採用<span>CAREER</span></a>
		</div>
		<ul class="front-topics">
			<li id="block-2" class="widget widget_block widget_text">
<p class="wp-block-paragraph"><a href="https://www.recruit.chika.co.jp/recruit-jobarchive/">インターンシップ受付中！</a></p>
</li>
		</ul>
	</div>
</div>
